risk_model.name: earnsafe_catboost_risk
risk_model.description: Trained on 600 rows of synthetic Chennai food delivery data covering monsoon, summer and dry season patterns across 10 delivery zones.

fraud_model.name: earnsafe_isolation_forest
fraud_model.description: Trained on 300 normal claims and 30 fraudulent patterns across GPS spoofing, hour inflation and dry-weather claims.
